source.title: The Great Awakening of Human Consciousness

core_synthesis: The source presents consciousness as a fundamental feature of reality and uses connection as its central organizing theme across person, Earth, cosmos, energy, awareness, spiritual traditions, symbolic geometry, and personal transformation.
boundary: This artifact summarizes and maps public source material. It does not validate the source claims.

candidate_templates.use: Separate testable practice claims from speculative cosmological claims.
Represent the source's developmental sequence from crisis through inward attention and expanded identity.
Represent inward and outward flow in the source-energy framing.

first_failure_condition: If the geometry cannot keep symbolic, experiential, empirical, and speculative claims separate, the template fails.
next_question: Can a radial-plus-spiral dynamic map classify the source's claims more clearly than a flat outline?
